name: config
description: View or update USERINPUT runtime configuration

time-increment.description: Seconds added per +Time button click in the GUI

cpu-limit.description: CPU load threshold for pre-launch warnings (%)

cpu-timeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait when CPU exceeds limit

enquiry-mode.description: Toggle persistent enquiry mode (bypass queue for all calls)

args.name: on|off
args.help: Enable or disable; omit for current status
